title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Carrot, Pudding as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see a bunch of ships in front of us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn... they got around us before we could shake our tail...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many people did they call up for this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: brother Peros, why'd you call us out here for just one little rat?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm tired of you lot and your role-playing games!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: headed for cacao Island, where pudding's waiting for her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it just me, or have you slammed down a bit, Mama?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how we turn here, we're surrounded.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've just got to go straight ahead and pierce through them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like the 3rd son, Daifuku, has his ship ahead of us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has a genie! He's a tough one.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get close enough for me to jump onto their ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: up close, huh... I don't think we'll manage to get away easily!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! Listen up! Use only the cannonballs without faces, alright?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you serious, Lord Dai- Fuku?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not sure if I could have a problem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I promise you I'll be useful!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: DON'T WORRY! Pedro TRAINED ME FOR IT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As Pedro would have said, "leave it to me!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am a musketer, you know.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 50 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
